text.title: Platform Governance: Policy-as-Code + FinOps Core Rules
text.summary: 6 testable rules including a `skip-this-methodology` rule. Each pairs a binary check with sourced rationale.

rule.statement: Admission policies MUST cover labels, resource limits, image registry allowlist, and host-network ban; less than that is rejected.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: Cost dashboards MUST partition spend by team via labels; aggregated-only views are rejected.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: PRs touching infra MUST emit a pre-merge cost estimate (Infracost / OpenCost) on every change > $50/month delta.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: Policy enforcement MUST be embedded in golden paths and CI — not external manual review.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: OPA bundles MUST be versioned and rolled out via GitOps; ad-hoc kubectl applies rejected.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: Skip when single-team platform OR cost data not yet labelled.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.
